## Validation

- Commands run:
  - `pnpm lint`
  - `pnpm test`

## Checklist

- [ ] I selected Spec Type and provided a Spec link or `No Spec` reason.
- [ ] I updated tests or explained why tests were not updated.
- [ ] I documented any DB/schema/env changes.
